case_title: SAN FRANCISCO CHRONICLE VS RUIMY, GEORGE DBA GLAMOUR JEWELRY

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT RUIMY, GEORGE DBA GLAMOUR JEWELRY DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE BY PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,074.54 FILED BY SAN FRANCISCO CHRONICLE AS TO DEFENDANT RUIMY, GEORGE DBA GLAMOUR JEWELRY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-21-2006 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
CORRESPONDENCE FROM DEFT, GEORGE RUIMY WITH COPY OF PAYMENT CHECK FOR $862.00.

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION AUG-21-2006, CONTINUED BY COURT TO SEP-25-2006 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 CONTINUED TO 9/25/06 AT 1:30 P.M. PENDING SETTLE MENT. IF NO APPEARANCE ON 9/25/06 AT 1:30 P.M. DISMISS WITH PREJUDICE.
